typography.instructions: Use 'Syne' for all major headings to give an art-gallery/luxury feel. Use 'Manrope' for all body text for high readability. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for technical details like part numbers or pricing.

containers.glass_card: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-500

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#333] focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 px-0 py-4 rounded-none focus:ring-0 transition-colors w-full text-lg

navigation.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12

hero.typography: Centered, massive H1, elegant fade-in up

location.overlay_card: Floating glass card with address and hours

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin stroke width (1.5px) for elegance.

motion.scroll_animation: whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid #050505 or subtle noise textures.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
All interactive elements must have hover states (text color change or scale).
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Syne'.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end automotive workshop site. Focus on 'Atmosphere' and 'Precision'. The site should feel like a luxury car dashboard. Use the provided image URLs. Implement the 'Bento' grid for services. Use the 'Glassmorphism' style for the parts search. Ensure the 'WhatsApp' button is floating and unobtrusive but visible.
